corrections.text: yro.slashdot.org is not currently on the project's source_allowlist. Slashdot is a long-established tech-news aggregator and is the primary outlet carrying the Dor Zvi quotes used in the article. All claims attributed to Slashdot were verified verbatim against the local snapshot during review. Adding slashdot.org / yro.slashdot.org to config/source_allowlist.txt is recommended.

The Axios source was fetched via Archive.org fallback during the chief-editor source-snapshot pass. Content matches the verbatim claims attributed to Axios in the article. This is editorial-process metadata rather than a factual issue.
